reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has brilliant faculty members and a fantastic campus.

review_content.Placements: 89% of students get placed every year. The lowest package is 4 LPA, and the highest package is 19 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Acmegrade and Wipro. Top roles offered in the course are marketing, salesperson, finance, human resources, and other management jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are well-organised and classrooms are digital, including a digital board, CCTV cameras, and a big library. The infrastructure is good for students as well as faculty members. Facilities available in the hostel are a mess, water coolers, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sangam University.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in this course was very good. The highest package offered to a student was 15 LPA, and the lowest was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies visited this college, and the percentage of students who got internships in this course was more than 20%.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in this course were very good. Wi-Fi and classrooms were present, and the library was also available. The quality of food provided in this course was very tasty. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also present in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Sangam University College review.

review_content.Placements: Students who scored around 50-60% and above, and the package for each student may be around 5 LPA - 15 LPA depending on their course. They had many connections with plenty of recruiting companies in each course. I am in the textile and fashion design course, so it had very vast roles in its field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had the best infrastructure compared to the other colleges in the city. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus. Our classrooms were very clean. The library had good books. We had clean washrooms. The hostel did not provide good things. The food was the worst. Sports were good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college environment, no fun or extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in 2nd year but as far as what I have heard from my seniors, the placements here are not very good. They don't provide good packages and they are not very good companies. The positions mainly provided are not satisfying the BBA passed out and are placed as trainees and something like that but here the positions which are offered are like tele caller, cashier, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: If we talk about facilities, hostel, and sports facilities are not that good. The mess and canteen are still good and if I talk about medical facilities I don't know much about it but still got everything I needed in times of emergency. Hostel buildings are old and moldy and there is no Wi-Fi facility available and also for sports facility they only have cricket and basketball and they don't have any indoor games as such.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are not that good but college life is great.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in B.Tech CSE 6th semester. Almost 90% of total students are placed but don't ask for the salary, it's just only 1 or 2 students get a good salary, other than those all get a very minimum salary like 2 LPA. Top recruiter is Sangam India as they are in the same industry as university. It is compulsory for all students to grab an internship in their 8th semester. Top roles offered are data entry and software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that good. University has gym, mess, canteen but lacks what's inside those. Some of the rooms are well-furnished and maintained for special events and labs for tech field students are developed. Also, medical facilities are very less. Quality of food in canteen is decent, sometimes it's good and sometimes not that good. Sports facilities are not provided at all here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: My experience with Sangam University has been absolutely wonderful!

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies like Capgemini, Genpact, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, TCS, Accenture, CDAC, Raletta Technology Private Limited, and Radix Web Private Limited visit our college for placements. Internships and industry projects are offered every semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good here, and the infrastructure is of good quality to give proper education for students. All the rooms in the hostel are in good condition, and the quality of food provided in the mess is also good. The hostel facilities are good and include Wi-Fi, single rooms, and double bedrooms.

courses.overview: Sangam University Courses & Fees 2025 There are a total of 92 courses offered at by the institute. These courses are offered across fields of Engineering and Science, etc. They are available at the UG and PG levels. These courses include B.E. / B.Tech, BSc, M.E./M.Tech, and MBA/PGDM, etc. Admission to some of the programmes is subject to merit in the last qualifying exam and for some courses, admission is entrance-based. admission_overview.college_name: Sangam University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Sangam University admission 2025is both merit and entrance-based. The institution accepts entrance exams to shortlist candidates for various courses. Some of the exams accepted by the institution includesGATE, CUET, and CUET-PG, etc.Sangam Universityoffers around92courses on its campus. These are available at UG and PG levels.
NOTE: Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
lists: Sangam University Duration: The institution offers UG programmes for54 months - 4 yearsduration. For PG level courses, the duration is1 year - 2 years.

Sangam University Fees: The total tuition fee for programmes offered at UG level isINR 15,000 - 3,85,500. For PG level courses, the total tuition fee isINR 15,000 - 1,94,000. Candidates can pay the fee in the mode specified by the institution.

courses_data.description: Sangam University offers the BSc course at the UG level for 3-5 years. Admissions are merit-based. It is offered in 8 specialisations- Industrial Engineering, Agriculture, Horticulture, Agriculture and Food Business, and Biology, etc.

courses_data.description: Sangam University offers the BTech course at the UG level for 4 years. Admissions are merit-based. paragraphs: According to Sangam University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Sangam University UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2022 stood at INR 2.5 LPA and INR 2.2 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during Sangam University PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 2.5 LPA .

hostel.description: Separate hostels for boys and girls carefully designed and planned with 24/7 security. The students can choose single, double or triple occupancy including three nutritiously balanced vegetarians (breakfast, lunch, dinner) and Hi-tea in the evenings. Hostels are well equipped with modern kitchens serving vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. The stay at our campus provides a treasure of experience by developing alliance and social responsibility.

library.description: The library has a reading room equipped with over 115 national and international journals, magazines, periodicals and newspapers to fulfill and supplement the academic needs of the students. Learning aids like educational charts, CD’s, book bank facility and reprographic services are also available. Library equipped with Lib-Sys software and barcoding system. To augment students’ learning, the university has a well-stocked digitized Library. State-of-the-art software makes it convenient and quicker to search and keep track of more than 45,000 books covering over 6,000 titles.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: It has brilliant faculty members and a fantastic campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well-organised and classrooms are digital, including a digital board, CCTV cameras, and a big library. The infrastructure is good for students as well as faculty members. Facilities available in the hostel are a mess, water coolers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sangam University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in this course were very good. Wi-Fi and classrooms were present, and the library was also available. The quality of food provided in this course was very tasty. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Sangam University College review.
reviews.review_text: The college had the best infrastructure compared to the other colleges in the city. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus. Our classrooms were very clean. The library had good books. We had clean washrooms. The hostel did not provide good things. The food was the worst. Sports were good.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college environment, no fun or extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about facilities, hostel, and sports facilities are not that good. The mess and canteen are still good and if I talk about medical facilities I don't know much about it but still got everything I needed in times of emergency. Hostel buildings are old and moldy and there is no Wi-Fi facility available and also for sports facility they only have cricket and basketball and they don't have any indoor games as such.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not that good but college life is great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good. University has gym, mess, canteen but lacks what's inside those. Some of the rooms are well-furnished and maintained for special events and labs for tech field students are developed. Also, medical facilities are very less. Quality of food in canteen is decent, sometimes it's good and sometimes not that good. Sports facilities are not provided at all here.

reviews.review_heading: My experience with Sangam University has been absolutely wonderful!
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good here, and the infrastructure is of good quality to give proper education for students. All the rooms in the hostel are in good condition, and the quality of food provided in the mess is also good. The hostel facilities are good and include Wi-Fi, single rooms, and double bedrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Building not of brick but of memories.
reviews.review_text: Everything was good about the course. I do not know much about the hostel, but I visited the hostel a few times. The hostel was good with nice facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Sangam university review of Shiksha.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in my course. The infrastructure of the college is superb, and classrooms and the library are available, but Wi-Fi is not provided. The food in the college canteen is not tasty. Medical facilities are not available in this course. Sports and games are always happening in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Sangam university.
reviews.review_text: All the basic and good facilities are provided in the my course . Wi-Fi and labs, as well as classrooms, are provided to all students in the college. The food quality of the canteen is so good. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and placements are available.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, and various facilities are available. Separate departments are provided, and classrooms are well cleaned. Wi-Fi and labs are available, and the food quality is acceptable. The mess is very hygienic, and sports and games are offered. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: According to the budget, the campus is good, the staff has a good nature, and placements are average
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. There is good competition in sports and opportunities; personally, I played cricket for the university. The food tastes better, and the quality is good. The medical facility could be better, and the canteen is not good; the service is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sangam University.
reviews.review_text: The college offers excellent facilities, and the infrastructure is impressive. Both Wi-Fi and a well-equipped library are available. While the food in the canteen is not the tastiest, it is healthy. Medical and sports facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but poor facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure is available, but facilities are very poor; they provide food and Wi-Fi of poor quality, classrooms are not cleaned, and separate departments are available. A medical kit is available in college. Sports and games are conducted every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Sangam University review.
reviews.review_text: Superb facilities and infrastructure are provided in my course. Wi-Fi, classrooms, library — all facilities are available. The food quality in the college canteen is bad, not tasty. Medical facilities and services are provided to the students. Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review is really good for this college.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi along with the labs and classrooms being good. Infrastructure is really good compared to the other in budget Universities. Also I tried the hostel but it is also good. There are some events which take place every year and there is a specific sports room do which you need permission to access.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sangam University

likes.text: Many top recruiting companies like White Hat, Sangam, Accenture, etc., visit our college for placements.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: They have huge labs, and a library, conference halls, playgrounds, lecture theatre, fully air-conditioned and well-maintained classes and some smart classes are also available.
Labs are large with good instruments, the food given in the hostel is good with proper diet and good health for students .

likes.text: The course curriculum is good with a lot of activities like debates, quizzes, presentations, and exhibitions which ultimately make students corporate ready.
The teachers are well-qualified and too experienced, Even they also take guest lectures from IIT professors and also prefer current updated things for examples.

highlights.summary: Admissions 2025 are open. Students can apply for the respective courses by visiting the official website of the college.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Bharath College of Science and Management?
faqs.answer: Bharath College of Science and Management admissions are merit-based. The institute considers the qualifying exam scores of the candidates for admission. The admission process at Bharat College of Science and Management includes registration, selection and admission confirmation. Bharath College of Science and Management admissions are open for the 2025 session.

A:    You have to have already graduated from a recognised university to apply for the MBA at Bharath College of Science and Management. About 50% is typically the minimum required, according to college rules. Have your documents and degree on hand before starting the application process
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Bharath College of Science and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    To get admission to the BBA course at Bharath College of Science and Management, candidates' Class 12 certificate should be from a recognised board. Your admission will be validated if your scores come from the CBSE or Tamil Nadu State Board. To improve your shot at being admitted, ensure your percentage passes the merit threshold.
faqs.question: What eligibility is required for BBA in Bharath College of Science and Management?

review_content.General: Commerce students benefit from well equipped classrooms a digital library and modern labs. The hostel offers clean rooms WiFi nutritious food and 24x7 security. It is ideal for focused learning and comfortable living. It has comprehensive infrastructure across its campuses including well equipped labs spacious lecture halls advanced medical facilities and robust IT infrastructure. The university also provides separate hostel facilities for both men and women. It has a transport facility and various recreational amenities like sports complexes and cafeterias.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college is friendly.

review_content.Placements: It has a well-established Nutrition & Dietetics department that can place ten to fifty students per year, with a placement rate commonly between 75-90%. In the 2020-21 placements, 60% of students get placements across in various multi-specialty hospitals in surroundings of Tamil Nadu.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food in the canteen is hygienic. We get subsidized food in college canteens and hostels. Vegetarian and non-veg options are often available. There is a free campus Wi-Fi (mostly limited speed), and it is accessible in classrooms, libraries, and hostels. There is access to textbooks, journals, research papers, and e-resources. Some have digital libraries and e-journals.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Evaluation of B.Com campus life: Facilities, classrooms, and placement support.

review_content.Placements: Out of 60 commerce students, 40 students got placed in firms like Deloitte, EY, KPMG, PwC, and Infosys. Roles offered are tax associate, audit analyst, and financial executive. The package ranges from 3-6 LPA. Students get internships at companies like HDFC Bank, Kodak, and Axis Bank.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure includes smart classrooms, a resource-rich library, and seminar halls. Hostel facilities are hygienic with regular maintenance, mess service, Wi-Fi, and recreational areas for students' well-being at Bharath College of Science and Management.

review_summary.college_name: Bharath College of Science and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Literature (Tamil) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is friendly and kind.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is around 60-65% of Tamil department students who were successfully placed in relevant fields. Schools, publishing houses, media channels, and Tamil content startups were the major recruiters. Government opportunities were given to students who cleared competitive exams and were recruited into Tamil Development and Cultural Departments.
content.Infrastructure: College has a spacious campus spread over 5 lacs sq.ft, with 1.7 lacs sq.ft. of built-up area. Classrooms are well-ventilated, and smart classrooms are also completed. The college infrastructure is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com in Computer Application - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive review of commerce program: Placements, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: 45 commerce students secured placements in companies like TCS Wipro Accenture and HCL. Students join as business analysts finance trainees and process associates. The average package is 4.2 LPA. Internships done at SBI generally have a strong placement record with a wide range of companies recruiting from their various campuses. In recent years they have seen a mix of high paying offers and a large volume of overall offers. The highest package is quite impressive and the average package tends to be in the moderate range.
content.Infrastructure: Commerce students benefit from well equipped classrooms a digital library and modern labs. The hostel offers clean rooms WiFi nutritious food and 24x7 security. It is ideal for focused learning and comfortable living. It has comprehensive infrastructure across its campuses including well equipped labs spacious lecture halls advanced medical facilities and robust IT infrastructure. The university also provides separate hostel facilities for both men and women. It has a transport facility and various recreational amenities like sports complexes and cafeterias.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is friendly.

content.Placements: It has a well-established Nutrition & Dietetics department that can place ten to fifty students per year, with a placement rate commonly between 75-90%. In the 2020-21 placements, 60% of students get placements across in various multi-specialty hospitals in surroundings of Tamil Nadu.
content.Infrastructure: The food in the canteen is hygienic. We get subsidized food in college canteens and hostels. Vegetarian and non-veg options are often available. There is a free campus Wi-Fi (mostly limited speed), and it is accessible in classrooms, libraries, and hostels. There is access to textbooks, journals, research papers, and e-resources. Some have digital libraries and e-journals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Evaluation of B.Com campus life: Facilities, classrooms, and placement support.

content.Placements: Out of 60 commerce students, 40 students got placed in firms like Deloitte, EY, KPMG, PwC, and Infosys. Roles offered are tax associate, audit analyst, and financial executive. The package ranges from 3-6 LPA. Students get internships at companies like HDFC Bank, Kodak, and Axis Bank.
content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure includes smart classrooms, a resource-rich library, and seminar halls. Hostel facilities are hygienic with regular maintenance, mess service, Wi-Fi, and recreational areas for students' well-being at Bharath College of Science and Management.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Literature (Tamil) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: So here, we can feel better.

content.Placements: Some students join as script editors, anchors, or reporters in Tamil TV and digital channels. The rise in digital Tamil content platforms gives students freelance and full-time opportunities. The college placement cell arranges soft skills and interview training, which benefits students.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate hostel blocks with mess facilities under a shared bill system. On-campus dining has shared mess billing. The standards are average based on student feedback. The staff here are very good and respectful, and they are all concerned about our lives.

college_info.college_name: Subhas Bose Institute of Hotel Management [SBIHM]

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Subhas Bose Institute of Hotel Management [SBIHM] Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

review_content.General: In my college classrooms were small and there was no proper Wi-Fi connection. We did not have a dedicated library, and only a few computers were available which was not sufficient for students. Hostel facilities were very basic with small rooms and the mess food was repetitive and often not of good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: SBIHM Jatragachi campus is a very good college for me. I think it will also be good for you.

review_content.Placements: Subhas Bose Institute of Hotel Management is one of the best management colleges in Kolkata. In the previous year, about 69% of students from our college got placed. Our course in tourism management offers a salary of Rs. 18,000 per month to Rs. 25,000 per month. This is the basic salary. JW Marriott, Taj Bengal, and ITC hotels come for our placements. In the previous year, about 89% of students got internships. We can go abroad after getting the job. Incentives are also with the job, depending on whether you are working hard or not.
review_content.Infrastructure: From the library, we can get every type of book we want. Hostel facilities are provided at Rs. 7000 per month.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Hotel Management - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure may not be good, but placement wise, it is okay.

review_content.Placements: The college is good, regarding placement, it has properties across India that are mostly five-star. Good positions are offered in the campus interviews. Proper exposure is given in to the practical world with good resources. There is a guarantee of 100 percent placement. They also offer several courses from abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is proper. The practical labs give a perfect exposure towards the real industry. During industrial training, a student gets the exact exposure of the work life, but it is just that there are a lot of hidden costs in the course. They have an excursion every year. For the first years, it is usually Goa, and there are also hotel visits and show around. The director is very polite and friendly.

overview_faqs.answer: Subhas Bose Institute of Hotel Management [SBIHM] is a reputed institute for MHA, B.A., BHM, After 1th Diploma, MHMCT, B.H.A., BHMTT, MBA/PGDM, B.FTech, MHMTT, B.M.M. review_summary.college_name: SBIHM Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Hospitality Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A very bad college. I personally am not going to suggest this college to anyone.

content.Placements: There is no placement till date. The college is really bad in the education industry. The companies are not interested in this college. This is a money making college, they just want to make money from students and do not have any educational values. In the name of placement, they give a Rs. 10,000 or Rs. 12,000 monthly salary package. I think the earnings of a labourer are much better than this salary package.
content.Infrastructure: The college has no infrastructure, just a 5 floor building that looks like apartments. There is no campus. I think the kindergarten infrastructure is much better than this college. There is no Wi-Fi, only a small library, bad cell classrooms, and some labs with no equipment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Hospital Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Small classrooms, no proper facilities, and a poor hostel.

content.Placements: In my course, approximately 50 percent of students were placed. The highest package was 8 LPA, the lowest package was 5 LPA, and the average package was 3 LPA. There are no companies for my course. About 60 percent of students from my course received internship opportunities in Desun Hospital, ILS Hospital, and BM Biral Hospital. There are no rules or offers for my course.
content.Infrastructure: In my college classrooms were small and there was no proper Wi-Fi connection. We did not have a dedicated library, and only a few computers were available which was not sufficient for students. Hostel facilities were very basic with small rooms and the mess food was repetitive and often not of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: SBIHM Jatragachi campus is a very good college for me. I think it will also be good for you.

content.Placements: Subhas Bose Institute of Hotel Management is one of the best management colleges in Kolkata. In the previous year, about 69% of students from our college got placed. Our course in tourism management offers a salary of Rs. 18,000 per month to Rs. 25,000 per month. This is the basic salary. JW Marriott, Taj Bengal, and ITC hotels come for our placements. In the previous year, about 89% of students got internships. We can go abroad after getting the job. Incentives are also with the job, depending on whether you are working hard or not.
content.Infrastructure: From the library, we can get every type of book we want. Hostel facilities are provided at Rs. 7000 per month.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Hotel Management - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure may not be good, but placement wise, it is okay.

content.Placements: The college is good, regarding placement, it has properties across India that are mostly five-star. Good positions are offered in the campus interviews. Proper exposure is given in to the practical world with good resources. There is a guarantee of 100 percent placement. They also offer several courses from abroad.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is proper. The practical labs give a perfect exposure towards the real industry. During industrial training, a student gets the exact exposure of the work life, but it is just that there are a lot of hidden costs in the course. They have an excursion every year. For the first years, it is usually Goa, and there are also hotel visits and show around. The director is very polite and friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Hospitality Management - Batch of 2011

content.Other: The worst college one can ever be with. The faculty members are average, but the management is pathetic. I had to pay for my semester fee two times because they did not keep any record of it. I do not know if they are running an institute or a fraud. My family was traumatized because of them. It is a total waste.

reviews.review_text: Our college didn?t have a hostel,the classes were very big where at-least 100 students could make place for their selves.we had a library, computer lab and each subjects had its personal training room where we could learn about the hotels and their curriculum

reviews.review_heading: Moderate college with high feels.

reviews.review_heading: Subhash Bose Institute of Hotel Management & Hospital .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good in this institute; they provide Wi-Fi, computer lab, canteen, library, an inquiry department, a decision-making class room, and hostel facilities. There are many sports like cricket, football, etc. There are medical departments available to help the students, and the food quality is good; they provide food like house.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to learn & make career.
reviews.review_text: State of the art infrastructure. The food Production lab is fully equipped with imported equipment. Advanced Training Kitchen, Bakery lab, Front office lab also provided. There is well-equipped training restaurant capacity of 60 seater. The canteen facilities are awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Life at SBIHM is very interesting.
reviews.review_text: The food production lab is completely equipped with imported equipment, and it has a seating capacity of 40 students. There is a well-equipped training restaurant. Laundry facilities are available for every student in the training period for guest room management. The canteen facility is awesome.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 783 students were admitted at Tirupur Kumaran College For Women and 707 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 707 students 545 were placed with median salary of INR 102000 and 156 students opted for higher studies. A total of 729 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at Tirupur Kumaran College For Womenand 659 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 659 students 186 were placed with median salary of INR 144000 and 170 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 193 students were admitted at Tirupur Kumaran College For Women and 176 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 176 students 110 were placed with median salary of INR 120000 and 35 students opted for higher studies. A total of 187 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Tirupur Kumaran College For Womenand 166 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 166 students 28 were placed with median salary of INR 144000 and 9 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.question: Q: Does BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

faqs.answer: ECE courses do offer various electives for you to opt in the both the UG-level and PG-level ECE courses where you get the chance to pick a specific subject that interests you more, is easy-going for you, and in which you can even pursue a specialisation further to tailor your career path in a particular direction. You can choose to pick a subject according to the specialised field within your broad ECE specialization, which you would like to enter into in the future, where you see yourself as a well-established engineer. For example, in BTech ECE, there are a variety of electives like Embedded Systems, Antenna Design, Fiber-optic communication, VLSI Technology, etc.Know more about -ECE Courses Syllabus
faqs.question: Q: Are there any elective subjects in ECE courses?

faqs.answer: The Electronics Engineering syllabus for the BTech degree is not the same across all colleges. Every college prefers to follow an individual coursework module that includes both theory classes and practical lab work. While core subjects and fundamental concepts might be similar, the structure, electives offered, and laboratory and project work are different.You can check the detailed syllabus for the course on the respective college websites that you're targeting to get a clearer picture.

placements.overview: This college functions as per the guidelines of Govt. of India. Thus, it offers Protsahan Puraskar Scheme (erstwhile Scholarship Scheme) to reserved sections namely SC/ST/Physically Handicapped and Female Students for admissions in NIELIT O/A/B/C level courses. The students are required to clear all the papers in a single attempt along with submitting a proof of family income (which should be less than Rs 1 LPA from all sources).

faqs.answer: A:    A Model Career Center (MCC) was created at the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) in Gorakhpur in 2015. The MCC has held seminars, placement drives, career drives, and activities. Several of the top employers are:Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)VK Soft PvtThe average salary package offered at NIELIT Aurangabad is 8 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 25 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average package offered at NIELIT Gorakhpur?

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) Gorakhpur's average salary ranges from INR 3 LPA to 4.5 LPA.The National Institute of Engineering (NIE)'s (the highest package) provided in 2021–2022 was 43.18 LPA.The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology in Aurangabad offered salaries ranging from INR 8 LPA on the low end to INR 25 LPA on the high.
faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the placements are good at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology gorakhpur. The Placement Cell of the National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology Gorakhpur is a full-fledged training and placement cell that periodically liaises and interacts with the corporate world to explore the possibility of training and job placement of students. The average package lies between INR 3LPA to 4.5LPA, which is decent enough for fresh graduates.
faqs.question: How are placements at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology gorakhpur?

faqs.answer: A:    At NIELIT Gorakhpur, the placement rate for M.Tech graduates typically falls between 60% and 70%. This fluctuates a little based on the particular programme and demand in the sector.Several IT and electronics companies, as well as TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, IBM, Accenture, and Cognizant, have claimed some successful placements.At NIELIT Gorakhpur, M.Tech graduates usually receive compensation packages that vary from 3 to 4.5 LPA on average. Although it's not as good as the best engineering

paragraphs: NIELIT Gorakhpur admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The institute admits students based on GATE or NIELIT Entrance Exam scores for admission for some courses.NIELIT Gorakhpuroffers courses at PG, diploma and certificate levels. The institute offers MTech, non-formal and formal programmes. Interested candidates can register on the official website of the institute for admission.

NIELIT offers admission to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam. The institute conducts the NIELIT Entrance Exam for O and A-level courses. Aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. Below areNIELIT Gorakhpur coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
O Level/government-recognised diploma of a minimum of 2 years after Class 10 or
Polytechnic Engineering diploma after Class 12. graduation and A Level course in each case

NIELIT Gorakhpur fee includes registration and examination fees. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. Below is the course-wise fee and intake for NIELIT Gorakhpur:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
NIELIT Gorakhpur admissions open in online mode. Admission for short-term courses is open throughout the year. Aspirants must follow the below steps to get a seat in NIELIT Gorakhpur:
STEP 1: NIELIT Shimla Application Process 2024

The mode of application is online. Aspirants can also download the form and submit it offline. Candidates need to fill out personal, academic and other details in the application form. Aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for MTech programme.
STEP 2: Selection

NIELIT selects candidates for admission based on merit in the last qualifying exam for diploma and certificate courses. NIELIT conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for O and A Level courses. The institute evaluates the application form of the aspirants for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the aspirants are informed about their selection, they need to pay theNIELIT Gorakhpur feeto confirm their seats.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur?
faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur admission process begins with registration. The institute releases the application form online for all programmes. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur?
faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur does offer direct admission. Aspirants need to meet the course-specific requirements for direct admission. For A Level, applicants must pass O Level or government recognised Polytechnic engineering diploma/ graduate, followed in each case, by one year relevant experience.

faqs.question: How are the placement of M.Tech in National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Gorakhpur?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology's Placement Cell is a fully functional training and placement cell that regularly communicates and engages with the business community to investigate the possibilities of student training and job placement. For recent grads, the typical salary ranges from INR 3LPA - 4.5LPA. Intel, HCL, Ashok Leyland, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Bosch, L&T, Caterpillar, CIPLA Pharmaceuticals, IBM India, Mistral Solutions Pvt Ltd, VVDN, Bosch, Einfochips, and other leading recruitment firms participated in the campus placement at NIELIT, Gorakhpur.

faqs.question: Which branch of M.Tech has more placements at NIELIT, Gorakhpur?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) Gorakhpur. The National Institute of Engineering (NIE)'s (the highest package) provided in 2021–2022 was 43.18 LPA.NIELIT Gorakhpur is offering Masters of Technology (M.Tech.) in two streams: 1. M.Tech in Electronics Design & Technology (ED&T). 2. M.Tech in VLSI Design.

faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur?
faqs.answer: At NIELIT Gorakhpur, the placement rate for M.Tech graduates typically falls between 60% and 70%. This fluctuates a little based on the particular programme and demand in the sector.Several IT and electronics companies, as well as TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, IBM, Accenture, and Cognizant, have claimed some successful placements. At NIELIT Gorakhpur, M.Tech graduates usually receive compensation packages that vary from 3 to 4.5 LPA on average. Although it's not as good as the best engineering schools in the area, this is still regarded as respectable and could be a fantastic place to start your career. The need for particular knowledge and abilities in the electronics and IT sectors at the moment affects placements.

description: NIELIT Gorakhpur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIELIT Gorakhpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

NIELIT Gorakhpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIELIT Gorakhpur CSE cutoff 2025 was 178718 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 259876, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the NIELIT Gorakhpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 178718 and 259876 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 178718 and 259876, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (minor in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (minor in Wearable Electronics) were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 322 and 334 in the AI quota.

paragraphs: Candidates need to pay a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,000 to apply for National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur M.Tech programme. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment mode. Candidates have to register online through ORP for M.Tech programme.

Undergraduate (UG), Postgraduate (PG), Advanced Diploma, Certificate, and Diploma programmes are just a few of the many courses that NIELIT provides at various levels. The kind and difficulty of the course have a big impact on the cost. Depending on the length and subject matter of the course, fees normally range from Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 30,000. Depending on the length and complexity of the programme, fees can range from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 60,000 for the whole thing.

Although NIELIT doesn't normally provide standard UG programmes like B.Tech, their equivalent Diploma programmes may cost between Rs. 30,000 and Rs. 60,000. The full cost of an M.Tech programme, which lasts two years, is fixed at Rs. 1.28 lakh. Additional fees are not included in this.

review_content.Other: Known for its beautiful infrastructure and quality educational services, OPJS University has started gaining appreciation from students, reviewers and other educational institutions. OPJS University has a widespread campus of 32 acres near Arvali Hills comprising of the main building, libraries, laboratories, hostels and residences for teachers and students. The design of the building is constructed in such a way that it consumes less energy and save more of it. There are ample facilities provided to the students of OPJS University such as transport, research, residencies, Wi-Fi inability, a big updated library etc. Each classroom has the capacity to accommodate 150 students and modern education facilities to ensure efficient learning. OPJS University was built in 2013 under the Act 16 of 2013 in the city of Churu in Rajasthan. The city is well connected to all the important cities of the state. The promulgation event of OPJS University was carried out in the presence of the honorable governor of the state. Students can apply for any of the educational programs for the wide variety of programs provided by the OPJS University in different streams. There are a number of undergraduate programs, special diploma programs, postgraduate programs and PhD programs available. Under the category of School of Education and Physical Education, it offers courses as follow- 1. M.A. 2. B.Ed./B.A./B.Sc.B.Ed. 3. B.P.Ed. 4. D.P.Ed. 5. B.EI.Ed. 6. D.EI.Ed. 7. B.P.E. 8. M.P.E. 9. D.P.S.E. Diploma in Preschool Education (D.P.S.E.) is available in OPJS University as a full time course of 2 years comprising of 4 semesters. The minimum eligibility required for D.P.S.E. is an HSC. The prescribed fees for D.P.S.E per year are Rs.25, 000 only. The students will have to pay Rs.1000 as exam fees for every semester.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Agriculture - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good university for Haryana and Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Placements are not available for this university. I think, soon it will be possible. This university is new and having a great start in sport and agriculture filed. The pharmacy department was also added in 2015. I have the great experience at this university, and I have like it.
content.Infrastructure: After the renovation, it's looking awesome. The new colour and the second floor of the boy's hostel. Free Wi-Fi is available in the university campus for all students. The library consists of all the useful books of my section. We always want to play volleyball on the sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Hotel Management - Batch of 2014

content.Other: Known for its beautiful infrastructure and quality educational services, OPJS University has started gaining appreciation from students, reviewers and other educational institutions. OPJS University has a widespread campus of 32 acres near Arvali Hills comprising of the main building, libraries, laboratories, hostels and residences for teachers and students. The design of the building is constructed in such a way that it consumes less energy and save more of it. There are ample facilities provided to the students of OPJS University such as transport, research, residencies, Wi-Fi inability, a big updated library etc. Each classroom has the capacity to accommodate 150 students and modern education facilities to ensure efficient learning. OPJS University was built in 2013 under the Act 16 of 2013 in the city of Churu in Rajasthan. The city is well connected to all the important cities of the state. The promulgation event of OPJS University was carried out in the presence of the honorable governor of the state. Students can apply for any of the educational programs for the wide variety of programs provided by the OPJS University in different streams. There are a number of undergraduate programs, special diploma programs, postgraduate programs and PhD programs available. Under the category of School of Education and Physical Education, it offers courses as follow- 1. M.A. 2. B.Ed./B.A./B.Sc.B.Ed. 3. B.P.Ed. 4. D.P.Ed. 5. B.EI.Ed. 6. D.EI.Ed. 7. B.P.E. 8. M.P.E. 9. D.P.S.E. Diploma in Preschool Education (D.P.S.E.) is available in OPJS University as a full time course of 2 years comprising of 4 semesters. The minimum eligibility required for D.P.S.E. is an HSC. The prescribed fees for D.P.S.E per year are Rs.25, 000 only. The students will have to pay Rs.1000 as exam fees for every semester.

admission_overview.college_name: OPJS University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Dates

paragraphs: OPJS University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts entrance exams for admission to courses such as PhD, MPhil, B.Ed and law courses. Selection for all other programmes is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.OPJS Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Management, Commerce, Engineering, etc. through 12 schools. Interested candidates can apply online for their preferred course.
OPJS University admissions are currently open. Candidates can apply for UG, PG or doctoral courses in regular mode. Below are the key admission highlights for OPJS:

OPJS University admissions are primarily based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. For some of the courses, the selection is based on university-level entrance exam. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for topOPJS University courses:

OPJS University fee breakup includes multiple components such as tuition fee, registration, exam, etc. Students are required to pay tuition fee semester-wise or annually. Candidates are required to pay course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Below is theOPJS University feefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

OPJS University offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university opens applications online on the official website of the university. Below is the step-wiseOPJS University admission process:
STEP 1: OPJS University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online for all courses. Candidates need to fill out the application form along with the specified documents. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria also need to pay a non-refundable application fee.
STEP 2: Selection

OPJS University selects candidates for admission based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam i.e. Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG courses. The university conducts an entrance exam for B.Ed, MPhil, PhD and law courses. OPJS accepts CUET score for admission to most of the UG courses.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection process is over and the entrance exam results are out, the university releases a merit list. The university might call the aspirants for document verification. Selected candidates need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

hostel.description: University has well furnished hostel rooms with an almirah, table, chair and a cot, water heater for both boys and girls. Water cooler with purifier are provided in the hostels.  Both hostels have common rooms with Television and indoor games facility and a dinning hall is also provided to the hostellers. The rooms are available in the form of Single Bedded Cubicle, Double Bedded and Triple Bedded.

library.description: The university has 2 storied central library which comprises of 30,000 books that covers all the faculties being taught in OPJS. It has subscribed to various national and international journals. The e-library has an access for reference to latest publications of the research journals / materials and information through 200 computers connected through LAN.In addition to this university also has a vast digital library. The library is well ventilated.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at MPU University Bhopal are BSc, BTech, and MBA. The University provides these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Madhyanchal Professional University offers specialisations in Engineering and Technology, Medical and Paramedical Sciences, Agriculture Sciences and Technology, Education, Nursing, Sciences and IT, Management and Commerce, etc.
The University offers UG, PG and Diploma level programmes in full-time mode for the duration of 1 year to 4 years. The MPU University Bhopal admission process is through merit and entrance. MPU Bhopal courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Madhyanchal Professional University, Bhopal, in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Madhyanchal Professional University Bhopal admission 2025 to UG, PG and Doctoral programmes is both merit and entrance-based, followed by a counselling round. The University conducts MPUPET for admission to PhD courses. MPU Bhopal also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc., for admission to specific courses.

Candidates willing to get admission must meet the minimum eligibility criteria. To get admission to the MBA programme, candidates must have a minimum aggregate of 50% in their undergraduate degree (45% in case of candidates belonging to the reserved category, i.e. SC/ ST/ OBC category). review_content.General: In the Arts department, there are no placements, but some companies recruit students for multitasking roles. During my time, there were no placements. However, after completing my course, the college offered interviews with many companies. However, those companies were not related to our fields, so it all depends on whether you are interested or not.
review_content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure; the canteen facility is excellent as well. There is a library, auditorium, temple, playground, and 7 buildings of 3 floors each. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. The medical center is located in the nursing building. The auditorium is very large, with a minimum seating capacity of 100.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The truth of the low-grade college.

review_content.Placements: As we all know, the CSE branch is famous, and the seats get filled easily, even in a low-grade college like this one. Almost every company needs a CSE graduation for various purposes, but the top recruiting company is TCS (Tata Consultancy Services). The highest package in CSE courses can be as much as 1 crore if someone has graduated from IITs, NITs or some other prestigious college or university. Even someone who graduated from a low-grade college but has some above-basic knowledge in the domain of web development, software development or some other coding knowledge can get a lower package. The internship depends on the students. If some students have basic knowledge of coding and have completed their DSA, they can apply for internships at various companies, like Google and others, and they can also work on open-source projects to gain real-life work experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: Around 3 to 10 students were placed with 2 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Byjus, Infosys, and Oracle. The highest salary package is around 10 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. There are no internships provided at this university. Top roles in this course are network administrator, full-stack developer, web developer, and app developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in this institution. Labs are available, so you can practice on a laptop or PC in the lab. The library is available. They give us books for 6 months. After that, we return to these books. We play volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi.

overview_faqs.question: How costly is MPU Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: MPU Bhopal fee structure varies from course to course, depending on the level and duration of it. Candidates can request for a prospectus from the University or can check out the official website to procure the same. However, the MPU Bhopal fee structure involves tuition fees, development fees and various other one-time fee components that are to be paid as per the Unviersity guidlines. Although, to conclude, the University has an average fee structure that makes it accessible to the masses.

overview_faqs.question: How is the safety and security of the students living in the campus of MPU Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: MPU Bhopal campus has 24/7 security surveillance along with various committees to maintain the prestige and security at the campus. The University has Anti Ragging Cell, Discipline Committee, SC, ST Committee, Value and Ethics Development Cell and a portal to report for any kind of student grievance. MPU Bhopal has staff and senior faculty members within the committees to maintain the decorum of the campus.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at Madhyanchal Professional University ?
overview_faqs.answer: Candidates who are selected for admission need to pay the course fee as per the frequency set by the university. The fee varies with the course and specialisation selected by the candidates. Below is the total annual fee for MPU Bhopal popular courses:CourseTotal Annual FeeBTechINR 1.20 lakh - INR 2.60 lakhMBAINR 60,000 (As per MOU for some of the specialisations)MTechINR 50,000BBAINR 54,000BComINR 54,000

overview_faqs.question: Does the MPU Bhopal's location offer any tourist attraction around the campus?
overview_faqs.answer: MPU Bhopal is located amidst the greens of Ratibad, Bhopal district. The University is located on the Bhopal-Sehore by-pass road and is well connected by air and rail. The University is originally located within the serene peace of hills and lake. However, all the tourist attractions are a few kms away and with easily access to commute.

review_summary.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent faculty and facilities, but disappointing placements.

content.Placements: There are many companies that hire students in bulk by giving them a stipend of 3-5 lacs per annum. About 5–10% of the students get hired because of the lack of jobs and their proficiency. 1.8 LPA is the lowest and 8 LPA is the highest package ever in my college. Cipla, Lupin, and TCS are some of the recruiting companies that come for placement. Above 70% of the students in my batch have completed internships at FDA, Bhopal. We can run a shop, join a MNC, prepare for government jobs, join the army as sepoy pharmacists, pass a government job like RRB and serve as railway pharmacists.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average college with worst management and worst placement rate this year. Infrastructure is everage.

content.Placements: The placement in my college is really poor. Only 3 to 4 students get placed this year. As for the highest package, 10 LPA is the highest package in our college, but it is the package of the 2021 batch, and the average package is 2.5 LPA. There are no internships.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are not good at all, and some computers in our lab do not even work. There is no hostel. The food in the canteen is pretty good, but the price is a little bit high. There is also a basketball court and a volleyball court. There is also a massive cricket field.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty members but dissatisfied by the colleges fake scenarios.

content.Placements: In the Arts department, there are no placements, but some companies recruit students for multitasking roles. During my time, there were no placements. However, after completing my course, the college offered interviews with many companies. However, those companies were not related to our fields, so it all depends on whether you are interested or not.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure; the canteen facility is excellent as well. There is a library, auditorium, temple, playground, and 7 buildings of 3 floors each. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. The medical center is located in the nursing building. The auditorium is very large, with a minimum seating capacity of 100.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The truth of the low-grade college.

content.Placements: As we all know, the CSE branch is famous, and the seats get filled easily, even in a low-grade college like this one. Almost every company needs a CSE graduation for various purposes, but the top recruiting company is TCS (Tata Consultancy Services). The highest package in CSE courses can be as much as 1 crore if someone has graduated from IITs, NITs or some other prestigious college or university. Even someone who graduated from a low-grade college but has some above-basic knowledge in the domain of web development, software development or some other coding knowledge can get a lower package. The internship depends on the students. If some students have basic knowledge of coding and have completed their DSA, they can apply for internships at various companies, like Google and others, and they can also work on open-source projects to gain real-life work experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: Around 3 to 10 students were placed with 2 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Byjus, Infosys, and Oracle. The highest salary package is around 10 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. There are no internships provided at this university. Top roles in this course are network administrator, full-stack developer, web developer, and app developer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in this institution. Labs are available, so you can practice on a laptop or PC in the lab. The library is available. They give us books for 6 months. After that, we return to these books. We play volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi.

admission_overview.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Application & Selection

paragraphs: MPU Bhopal admission 2025is both merit and entrance-based. The university conductsMPUPETfor admission to PhD courses.MPU Bhopalalso accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc., for admission to specific courses. The university offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Commerce, Science, etc. Interested candidates can apply online or offline for admission.

The university offers courses in full-time offline mode. Candidates can fill out the application form online or visit the university for the same. Below are the key highlights related toMPU Bhopal admissions:
Particulars
MPU Bhopal Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://mpu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to Madhyanchal Professional University is based on a qualifying exam or entrance test scores. The university may conduct MPUCET for admission to UG and PG courses. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses to apply for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popularMPU Bhopal coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Course Name
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate with (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)Physics, Chemistry &Mathematicsas compulsory subjects

Note:Candidates applying for UG or PG courses may also need to appear for MPUCET conducted by the university. Reach out to the university for more information on this.
Steps for MPU Bhopal Admission Process 2025

Admissions are currently open at MPU Bhopal. Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply for admission. The university shortlists candidates for admission based on their score in the qualifying exam or entrance test. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: MPU Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. However, aspirants looking for offline applications must visit the campus. Aspirants have to pay an application fee to apply for admission.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The university shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for most of the courses. MPU accepts JEE Main for BTech and UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET/ SLET/ GATE for PhD admission. The university conducts MPUPET for selecting candidates for PhD programme. The university may also conduct MPUCET for admission to UG and PG courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay theMPU Bhopal feeat the time of admission.

college_info.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: MPU Bhopal offers relaxation through scholarships on the basis of merit, need, sports and government aided. Eligible candidates must apply for the scholarship during the time of application process. MPU Bhopal National Talent Hunt scholarship test has been introduced for the deserving candidates to rightfully secure a scholarship. Candidates must apply by attaching the National Talent Hunt Scholarship application form along with other supporting documents during admission.

MPU Bhopal fee structure varies from course to course, depending on the level and duration of it. Candidates can request for a prospectus from the University or can check out the official website to procure the same. However, the MPU Bhopal fee structure involves tuition fees, development fees and various other one-time fee components that are to be paid as per the Unviersity guidlines. Although, to conclude, the University has an average fee structure that makes it accessible to the masses.
